eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Juneau, AK; at 4:30 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 5:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: CBJ: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for Juneau. This is only a test.  No action is required.
